generated_oml:
instance MABIMAX100FirstAxisEnvironment : DTDFVocab:Environment [
    base:desc "First axis of MABI MAX 100 industrial robot with working range [-90°, 90°] and max speed 75°/s"
    base:contains PermanentMagnetSynchronousMotor, Gearwheel, CycloidalGearbox, SiemensSINUMERIK840DslCNCController, MotorEncoder, SecondaryEncoder, CurrentSensors
]

instance PermanentMagnetSynchronousMotor : DTDFVocab:Component [
    base:desc "Permanent magnet synchronous motor generating torque τ_M from current I_M"
]

instance Gearwheel : DTDFVocab:Component [
    base:desc "Gearwheel transforming rotational energy with torque τ_G"
]

instance CycloidalGearbox : DTDFVocab:Component [
    base:desc "Cycloidal gearbox outputting torque τ_out"
]

instance SiemensSINUMERIK840DslCNCController : DTDFVocab:Enabler [
    base:desc "Siemens SINUMERIK 840D sl CNC controller for position, speed, or acceleration inputs"
]

instance MotorEncoder : DTDFVocab:Component [
    base:desc "Motor encoder mounted directly on motor"
    DTDFVocab:producedData MotorPositionDataTransmitted
]

instance SecondaryEncoder : DTDFVocab:Component [
    base:desc "Secondary encoder mounted behind gearbox"
    DTDFVocab:producedData GearPositionDataTransmitted
]

instance CurrentSensors : DTDFVocab:Component [
    base:desc "Current sensors measuring input current"
    DTDFVocab:producedData InputCurrentDataTransmitted
]

instance MotorPositionDataTransmitted : DTDFVocab:DataTransmitted [
    DTDFVocab:producedFrom MotorEncoder
]

instance GearPositionDataTransmitted : DTDFVocab:DataTransmitted [
    DTDFVocab:producedFrom SecondaryEncoder
]

instance InputCurrentDataTransmitted : DTDFVocab:DataTransmitted [
    DTDFVocab:producedFrom CurrentSensors
]

instance DerivedTorqueDataTransmitted : DTDFVocab:DataTransmitted [
    DTDFVocab:producedFrom MotorEncoder, SecondaryEncoder, CurrentSensors
]

instance DerivedAngularVelocityDataTransmitted : DTDFVocab:DataTransmitted [
    DTDFVocab:producedFrom MotorEncoder, SecondaryEncoder
]

instance SimulatedMotorPositionDataTransmitted : DTDFVocab:DataTransmitted [
]

instance SimulatedGearPositionDataTransmitted : DTDFVocab:DataTransmitted [
]

instance SimulatedOutputPositionDataTransmitted : DTDFVocab:DataTransmitted [
]

instance MeasuredMotorPosition : DTDFVocab:Data [
    base:desc "Measured angular position of motor shaft"
    DTDFVocab:fromData MotorPositionDataTransmitted
    DTDFVocab:inputTo MATLABSimulink, MQTT
]

instance MeasuredGearPosition : DTDFVocab:Data [
    base:desc "Measured angular position after gearbox"
    DTDFVocab:fromData GearPositionDataTransmitted
    DTDFVocab:inputTo MATLABSimulink, MQTT
]

instance MeasuredCurrent : DTDFVocab:Data [
    base:desc "Measured input current to motor"
    DTDFVocab:fromData InputCurrentDataTransmitted
    DTDFVocab:inputTo MATLABSimulink, MQTT
]

instance DerivedTorque : DTDFVocab:Data [
    base:desc "Derived torque from motor dynamics model"
    DTDFVocab:fromData DerivedTorqueDataTransmitted
    DTDFVocab:inputTo MATLABSimulink
]

instance DerivedAngularVelocity : DTDFVocab:Data [
    base:desc "Derived angular velocity from motor dynamics model"
    DTDFVocab:fromData DerivedAngularVelocityDataTransmitted
    DTDFVocab:inputTo MATLABSimulink
]

instance SimulatedMotorPosition : DTDFVocab:Data [
    base:desc "Simulated motor position r_M with traceable origins"
    DTDFVocab:fromData SimulatedMotorPositionDataTransmitted
    DTDFVocab:inputTo MATLABSimulink
]

instance SimulatedGearPosition : DTDFVocab:Data [
    base:desc "Simulated gear position r_G with traceable origins"
    DTDFVocab:fromData SimulatedGearPositionDataTransmitted
    DTDFVocab:inputTo MATLABSimulink
]

instance SimulatedOutputPosition : DTDFVocab:Data [
    base:desc "Simulated output position r_out with traceable origins"
    DTDFVocab:fromData SimulatedOutputPositionDataTransmitted
    DTDFVocab:inputTo MATLABSimulink
]

instance AssetAdministrationShells : DTDFVocab:Enabler [
    base:desc "Asset Administration Shells for asset metadata management"
    DTDFVocab:enables FrictionIdentificationService
]

instance SysML : DTDFVocab:Enabler [
    base:desc "SysML for structural modeling of components"
    DTDFVocab:enables FrictionIdentificationService
]

instance MATLABSimulink : DTDFVocab:Enabler [
    base:desc "MathWorks MATLAB Simulink for friction dynamics simulation"
    DTDFVocab:enables FrictionIdentificationService
]

instance MQTT : DTDFVocab:Enabler [
    base:desc "MQTT protocol for real-time data streaming"
    DTDFVocab:enables FrictionIdentificationService, FrictionVisualizationService
]

instance DashboardVisualizationTools : DTDFVocab:Enabler [
    base:desc "Dashboard tools for unified visualization of friction data"
    DTDFVocab:enables FrictionVisualizationService
]

instance AASMetadata : DTDFVocab:Model [
    base:desc "Asset Administration Shells for asset metadata"
    DTDFVocab:inputTo AssetAdministrationShells
]

instance SysMLStructuralModel : DTDFVocab:Model [
    base:desc "SysML BDD and IBD models for component interconnections"
    DTDFVocab:inputTo SysML
]

instance SimulinkFrictionDynamicsModel : DTDFVocab:Model [
    base:desc "Simulink simulation model for Coulomb-Viscous, Stribeck, Dahl, LuGre friction dynamics"
    DTDFVocab:inputTo MATLABSimulink
]

instance FrictionIdentificationService : DTDFVocab:Service [
    base:desc "Continuous multi-physics-aware identification of joint friction using white-box and black-box models"
    DTDFVocab:provides FrictionModelInsight, AdjustControlParameters
]

instance FrictionVisualizationService : DTDFVocab:Service [
    base:desc "Integrated visualization of friction data through a unified dashboard"
    DTDFVocab:provides FrictionDataVisualizationInsight
]

instance FrictionModelInsight : DTDFVocab:Insight [
    base:desc "Identified joint friction parameters for motion accuracy enhancement"
]

instance AdjustControlParameters : DTDFVocab:Action [
    base:desc "Adjustment of robot control parameters based on friction model identification to enhance motion accuracy during machining operations"
    DTDFVocab:IsAutomatic true
]

instance FrictionDataVisualizationInsight : DTDFVocab:Insight [
    base:desc "Unified dashboard visualization of friction data"
]

instance twinning_time_scale : DTDFVocab:TimeScale [
    base:desc "Real-time data streaming and processing with live measurements from physical system for immediate friction model updates during robot operation."
]

instance dt_constellation : DTDFVocab:Constellation [
    base:desc "Integration of SysML structural models, Simulink behavioral models, live sensor data streams via MQTT, processing components for friction calculation, and unified dashboard visualization for comprehensive monitoring of robot first axis behavior."
]

instance life_cycle_stages : DTDFVocab:EvolutionStage [
    base:desc "As operated phase, focusing on real-time friction identification and motion control improvement during operational use of the robot."
]

instance fidelity_and_validity_considerations : DTDFVocab:FidelityConsideration [
    base:desc "Traceability of data generation through processing components and models, with combined white-box and black-box friction models validated against real-time measurements for accuracy improvement."
]

instance dt_technical_connection : DTDFVocab:TechnicalConnection [
    base:desc "MQTT protocol for real-time streaming of sensor data (current, position) from physical robot to digital shadow."
]

instance standardization : DTDFVocab:Standardization [
    base:desc "Asset Administration Shells (AAS) for industrial asset description and SysML for model-based systems engineering."
]
